title: plectranthus indicus
intro: Plectranthus indicus, also known as Mint Leaf or Vicks Plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it effective in relieving coughs and colds. The health benefits of Plectranthus indicus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Plectranthus indicus include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including asthma, bronchitis, and headaches.
